backstory.original: Excitable, friendly, and insatiably curious, Tasslehoff Burrfoot is a kender of no small renown. Tas is the beating heart of the Heroes of the Lance, and his knack for 'borrowing' somehow manages to solve more problems than it causes. While Tas may not see himself as a hero, he is fearless in the face of Krynn's greatest dangers, and he always comes to the aid of his friends.
backstory.display: 泰索何夫·柏伏特是一位颇有名气的坎德人，他容易激动，待人友善，而且有着永不满足的好奇心。泰索是“长枪英雄”的灵魂人物，而他那“借用东西”的本事往往能解决比制造出来的还要多的问题。虽然泰索不认为自己是英雄，但他在面对克莱恩最危险的威胁时也毫不畏惧，并且总会向他的朋友伸出援手。

description.original: Tasslehoff fires a stone at the closest enemy, dealing one hit.
description.display: 泰索何夫向距离最近的敌人发射一枚石头，造成一次命中。

description.original: Tasslehoff causes the next ultimate used to deal 400% more damage with that ultimate.
description.display: 泰索何夫使下一次使用的杀招造成 400% 的额外伤害。

longDescription.original: Tasslehoff encourages the next Champion to use their ultimate to deal 400% more damage with that ultimate.
longDescription.display: 泰索何夫会鼓励下一个使用杀招的勇士，使该杀招造成 400% 的额外伤害。

description.desc: Tasslehoff is immune to being Stunned.
泰索何夫免疫眩晕。

name.display: 地图收藏家：大灾变之前

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the damage of Champions in the rear-most column by $amount%.
泰索何夫使身处最后一列中的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationName.display: 地图收藏家：大灾变之前

specializationDescription.original: Some of Tasslehoff's maps date as far back as before the Cataclysm, an event so powerful it reshaped the lands of Krynn.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索何夫的一些地图可以追溯到大灾变之前，那是一件影响十分重大的事件，它重塑了克莱恩的土地。

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the damage of Champions in the second to rear-most column by $amount%
泰索何夫使身处倒数第二列中的勇士伤害提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Tasslehoff's maps that date after the Cataclysm come from a time when the people believed the gods had abandoned Krynn.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索何夫那些绘制于大灾变之后的地图，出自一个人们相信众神已抛弃克莱恩的时代。

name.original: Map Collector: War of the Lance

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the damage of Champions in the third to rear-most column by $amount%
泰索何夫使身处倒数第三列中的勇士伤害提高 $amount%

specializationName.original: Map Collector: War of the Lance

specializationDescription.original: Tas' newest maps were often inspired by his own travels.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索最新的地图往往是受他自己的游历启发的。

description.desc: Tasslehoff prevents any Champion-sourced non-healing positional formation abilities from targeting his slot or adjacent slots. For each prevented ability per slot, he gains a Diversion stack. Tasslehoff increases the effect of his Map Collector specialization by $amount% for each Diversion stack, stacking multiplicatively.
泰索何夫会阻止任何来自勇士的非治疗位置阵型技能以他所在的格子或相邻的格子为目标。每阻止了一项此类技能（每个格子计一次），他获得一层“声东击西”堆叠层数。每有一层“声东击西”堆叠层数，泰索何夫会使他“地图收藏家”专精的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Tasslehoff prevents non-healing positional formation abilities from buffing his slot and adjacent slots, but his buff grows stronger for each instance this occurs.
tipText.display: 泰索何夫会阻止非治疗的位置阵型技能对他所在的格子和相邻的格子提供增益，但他每阻止一次增益，他自己的增益效果会变得更强。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,19240,19241,19242","description":"Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's Map Collector ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: Each time the party completes an area, Tasslehoff somehow comes into possession of some future quest items, setting his Found Item stacks to 7. When Tasslehoff attacks an enemy that can drop quest items, there is a $amount% chance he spends a Found Item stack and adds a quest item to the party's quest progress.
每当探险队完成一个区域，泰索何夫会以某种方式获得一些未来的任务物品，并将他的“找到的物品”堆叠层数设为 7。当泰索何夫攻击一名会掉落任务物品的敌人时，有 $amount% 的几率他会消耗一层“找到的物品”堆叠，并添加一件任务物品到探险队的任务进度。

tipText.original: In areas requiring quest items, Tasslehoff will sometimes find a quest item when he attacks.
tipText.display: 在需要任务物品的区域，泰索何夫进行攻击时有时会找到任务物品。

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the next ultimate's damage by 400%
泰索何夫使下一次杀招的伤害提高 400%

Tasslehoff grows impatient if he remains in the same area for a long time. Tasslehoff increases the effect of his Map Collector specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% for every 10 seconds the party is in an area, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times and resetting when changing areas.
如果泰索何夫在同一个区域待太久，他会变得不耐烦。探险队每在一个区域中停留 10 秒，泰索何夫会使他“地图收藏家”专精的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 次，并且在区域切换时重置。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,19240,19241,19242","description":"Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's Map Collector ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the effect of his Map Collector specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% for each dwarf, fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and/or plasmoid Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kender`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`)

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位矮人、仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、狗头人和/或等离子体勇士，泰索何夫会使他“地图收藏家”专精的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kender`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`)

specializationDescription.original: Tas considers the dwarf Flint as his best friend, and while it may seem one-sided, Flint cares for him just as deeply.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索认为矮人弗林特是他最好的朋友，虽然似乎只有他单方面这样认为，但弗林特同样很关心他。

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the effect of his Map Collector specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Speed Champion and/or Champion with a Dexterity of 16 or higher in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位速度型勇士和/或敏捷大于等于 16 的勇士，泰索何夫会使他“地图收藏家”专精的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Tas approaches everyone with an open heart and is quick to make new friends.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索对谁都敞开心扉，很快就能交到新的朋友。

description.desc: Tasslehoff increases the effect of his Map Collector specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Hero of the Lance and Champions that are 38 years and older in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位“长枪英雄”或年龄大于等于 38 岁的勇士，泰索何夫会使他“地图收藏家”专精的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Tas is fiercely loyal to his friends, especially his old adventuring companions.
specializationDescription.display: 泰索对朋友极其忠诚，尤其是和他一起冒险的老伙计。

description.original: We have to keep trying and hoping. ~Tas
description.display: 我们必须不断尝试，不能放弃希望。~泰索

description.original: We'll take the lead, we mighty warriors. ~Tas
description.display: 我们来打头阵，我们是强大的战士。~泰索

description.original: Have you got a map of this area, Tas? ~Tanis
description.display: 你有这片区域的地图吗，泰索？~塔尼斯

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's Map Collector Specializations by $amount%

description.original: The Haven Road through Solace Vale is quickest, that's for sure. ~Tas
description.display: 走穿过索拉斯谷的海文路是最快的，那是肯定的。~泰索

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's Map Collector Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Looks are as deceptive as light-fingered kender. ~Raistlin
description.display: 长相就跟手脚不干净的坎德人一样，十分具有欺骗性。~雷斯林

description.original: Keep your hands out of other people's belongings. ~Tanis
description.display: 不要碰别人的东西。~塔尼斯

description.original: I'm not going to take it! I just mentioned it, as an item of interest. ~Tas
description.display: 我没有要拿走它！我只是提到了它，觉得它很有意思罢了。~泰索

description.original: I'm not supposed to be the one that thinks. I just come along for the fun. ~Tas
description.display: 我不应该是动脑思考的那个人。我只是跟着来找乐子的。~泰索

description.original: No one would ever suspect a kender traveling alone. ~Tas
description.display: 没人会怀疑一个独自旅行的坎德人。~泰索

description.original: I am Tasslehoff Burrfoot. My friends call me Tas. Who are you? ~Tas
description.display: 我是泰索何夫·柏伏特。我的朋友都叫我泰索。你是谁？~泰索

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Let's trust these old gods, since it seems we have found them. ~Tas
description.display: 既然我们似乎已经找到这些古老的神了，那我们就信他们吧。~泰索

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: I demand the right to represent my people on the advisory council. ~Tas
description.display: 我要求拥有在顾问委员会中代表我族人的权利。~泰索

description.original: Where is that kender? I suppose he stole the barmaid. ~Flint
description.display: 那个坎德人去哪儿了？我看他连酒馆女招待都给偷走了。~弗林特

character_sheet_details.backstory: Excitable, friendly, and insatiably curious, Tasslehoff Burrfoot is a kender of no small renown. Tas is the beating heart of the Heroes of the Lance, and his knack for 'borrowing' somehow manages to solve more problems than it causes. While Tas may not see himself as a hero, he is fearless in the face of Krynn's greatest dangers, and he always comes to the aid of his friends.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Tasslehoff is a Support and Speed Champion who buffs Champions in one of the back three columns of the player's choice. His diversionary nature strengthens that column at the cost of positional formation abilities next to him, and his wanderlust further increases his support as the party remains in an area. Finally, his habit to borrow items speeds up progression in areas with quest items.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 泰索何夫·柏伏特是一位颇有名气的坎德人，他容易激动，待人友善，而且有着永不满足的好奇心。泰索是“长枪英雄”的灵魂人物，而他那“借用东西”的本事往往能解决比制造出来的还要多的问题。虽然泰索不认为自己是英雄，但他在面对克莱恩最危险的威胁时也毫不畏惧，并且总会向他的朋友伸出援手。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 泰索何夫是一位支援和速度型勇士，会为身处后三列之一（由玩家选择）中的勇士提供增益。他声东击西的性格会强化该列，但代价是削弱作用于他相邻格子的位置阵型技能，而他的流浪癖则会随着探险队在一个区域停留的时间增加而进一步提升他的支援效果。最后，他喜欢借用别人东西的习惯会加快区域任务物品的收集进度。

display.long_description: 泰索何夫会鼓励下一个使用杀招的勇士，使该杀招造成 400% 的额外伤害。

original.description: I'm not going to take it! I just mentioned it, as an item of interest. ~Tas

display.name: 贪婪
display.description: 我没有要拿走它！我只是提到了它，觉得它很有意思罢了。~泰索

original.name: Wayfarer
original.description: I'm not supposed to be the one that thinks. I just come along for the fun. ~Tas

display.name: 旅人
display.description: 我不应该是动脑思考的那个人。我只是跟着来找乐子的。~泰索

original.name: Scout
original.description: No one would ever suspect a kender traveling alone. ~Tas

display.name: 斥候
display.description: 没人会怀疑一个独自旅行的坎德人。~泰索

original.name: Affable
original.description: I am Tasslehoff Burrfoot. My friends call me Tas. Who are you? ~Tas

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 友善
display.description: 我是泰索何夫·柏伏特。我的朋友都叫我泰索。你是谁？~泰索

effects.description: 使泰索何夫第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Favorable
original.description: Let's trust these old gods, since it seems we have found them. ~Tas

effects.description: Increases the effect of Tasslehoff's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 讨人喜欢
display.description: 既然我们似乎已经找到这些古老的神了，那我们就信他们吧。~泰索

effects.description: 使泰索何夫第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Scholar
original.description: I demand the right to represent my people on the advisory council. ~Tas

display.name: 学者
display.description: 我要求拥有在顾问委员会中代表我族人的权利。~泰索

original.name: Entertainer
original.description: Where is that kender? I suppose he stole the barmaid. ~Flint

display.name: 艺人
display.description: 那个坎德人去哪儿了？我看他连酒馆女招待都给偷走了。~弗林特
